subject: fix(menu): fix tap-outside close and scroll-through on mobile
body:
Two bugs caused by the navbar's backdrop-filter creating a containing
block for position:fixed — the backdrop only covered the navbar area,
not the full viewport.

1. Tap outside menu didn't close: replaced backdrop click handler with
   a document-level click handler that checks if the target is outside
   the menu and trigger. Works regardless of backdrop positioning.

2. Scroll bled through to page: added body overflow lock on menu open,
   restored on close. overscroll-contain alone only prevents chaining
   on scroll containers — taps on non-scrollable menu areas (nav links,
   toggle button) still chained to the body.

Tags: bugfix, mobile, ui, accessibility
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-system
Semver: patch
